'''Gorrnar''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] food that was served frozen. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] deemed it as a "safe" food, fit for [[Human/Legends|Human]] consumption—as many Wookiee foods were spicy enough to cause damage to a Human's gullet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
*{{GalaxiesAED}}
